description: Construct-proximal human motif labels such as aggressive intrusion and over-yielding/freezing may be used as circular consequence endpoints for competitive or over-yielding IPV deviations.
required_fix: Add ontology eligibility tiers and explicitly forbid construct-proximal descriptors from serving as primary event-IPV validation endpoints unless used only as secondary descriptive context.

description: The development-subset threshold source is not specified tightly enough to prevent selection by outcome knowledge or outcome-correlated proxies.
required_fix: Predefine and freeze development-subset construction including sample frame, random/scenario-stratified method, seed/hash, no-overlap rules, prohibited metadata/proxies, builder role, and frozen manifest before threshold work.

description: Gate 012B does not explicitly require PASS for Gates 012-0 through 012-3 or frozen Wave-A deliverables before later event-IPV analysis.
required_fix: Amend Gate 012B to require prior gate PASS statuses, frozen ontology and threshold rationale, frozen blind-package audit, frozen agreement protocol, and explicit authorization before event-IPV analysis.

description: The candidate event list omits or does not explicitly exclude additional consequence classes such as collision/contact, timeout/no-progress, takeover, emergency stop, abrupt lateral comfort events, and yielding to non-counterpart actors.
required_fix: Add these as audit candidates or document their exclusion/unavailability in W0/W1.

description: The denylist covers explicit outcomes but does not globally name indirect leakage proxies that W4 later audits for blind packages.
required_fix: Promote area/scenario/run IDs, filenames, paths, order, thumbnails, manifest-derived strata, and prior annotation files to the global denylist unless approved as outcome-blind design variables.

description: Blind issuance is required but not made reproducibility-auditable through checksums, randomized order, neutral IDs, or embedded metadata stripping.
required_fix: Require an issuance manifest with checksums, neutral IDs, randomized order seed, metadata-stripping evidence, and auditor sign-off before release.

description: The merge pipeline is asked to reject simulated labels, but content-only tests cannot reliably detect simulation.
required_fix: Add annotator attestation, provenance checks, controlled submission channels, and metadata/audit logs to merge validation.
